mentions.note: Commercial aircraft services; expect strong performance; data-center backup power business adds growth; stock hit could be attractive if it dips.

Aerospace aftermarket parts, services, software provider. Reported higher-than-expected sales, 15-cent earnings beat; raised full-year organic growth guidance. Demand strong because Boeing/Airbus can't make planes fast enough, so airlines maintaining existing fleets. Software platform (100+ airlines) creates sticky recurring revenue.
Commercial airline parts supplier up 27% YTD; part of great aerospace boom with no sign of slowing; CEO John Holmes recently on show; can't-miss opportunity.
